news.title: Komedyen Deniz Göktaş hakkında soruşturma başlatıldı

news.title: Aftershock frays nerves as many Venezuelans left to fend for themselves
news.summary: In areas devastated by the twin earthquakes, people are using crowbars, pickaxes and their bare hands to try to reach survivors.

news.title: Six people shot dead at centre for mothers and children in Germany
news.summary: The male suspect who has been arrested was in a custody dispute over his baby daughter, police say.

news.title: Trump's final appeal of E Jean Carroll sex abuse case rejected
news.summary: The Supreme Court decision means the US president will now have to pay Carroll the $5m (£3.6m) in damages she had been awarded.

news.title: US says it has agreed to 'stand down' after exchange of strikes with Iran
news.summary: A series of strikes over the weekend saw the US and Iran accuse each other of violating the ceasefire agreement.

news.summary: Pakistan claims it was targeting militants near its border, but the Taliban government calls it an "atrocity".

news.title: Venezuela earthquake victims shelter at golf course
news.summary: Hundreds of Venezuelans are sheltering at a golf course in La Guaira after last week's deadly earthquakes.

news.title: The Temporary Protected Status program may effectively be over. Here's what we know.
news.summary: A Supreme Court ruling gives the Trump administration space to strip this status from hundreds of thousands of more people from the few remaining countries with this program.

news.title: Senate Ethics Committee dismisses complaint against Sen. Ruben Gallego
news.summary: The committee had been alerted by a fellow member of Congress of allegations of campaign finance violations and potential sexual misconduct, but said it found no evidence of wrongdoing.

news.title: Supreme Court restricts use of geofence warrants
news.summary: Writing for the 6-3 majority, Justice Elena Kagan said that the technique, known as geofencing, violates the Fourth Amendment's prohibition against unreasonable searches.

news.title: Supreme Court says Fed's Lisa Cook can stay in her job for now
news.summary: The court's decision means Cook can stay in her position as her challenge to her dismissal plays out in the lower courts.

news.title: Supreme Court cements Trump's power over agencies long considered independent
news.summary: In a 6-3 decision, the Supreme Court struck down a 91-year-old precedent that has prevented presidents from removing members of independent agencies meant to be a check on his power.

facts.text: Honey never spoils — edible honey has been found in ancient tombs.
A day on Venus is longer than its year.
Bananas are berries; strawberries are not.
